title: TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
short_info: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Relaxation applicable as per Government/TANUVAS norms

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor in Veterinary Sciences / Master degree in Livestock Products Technology, M.Sc Food Processing/ Food technology /M.Tech. in Poultry Technology
qualification.details: Bachelor in Veterinary Sciences / Master degree in Livestock Products Technology OR M.Sc Food Processing/ Food technology /M.Tech. in Poultry Technology

selection_process: and research credentials Written test (if large number of applications) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TANUVAS Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TANUVAS Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant position is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor in Veterinary Sciences or a Master's degree in Livestock Products Technology, M.Sc Food Processing/Food Technology, or M.Tech. in Poultry Technology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for this post is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government/TANUVAS norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TANUVAS Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening based on academic qualifications, experience, and research credentials, followed by a written test (if applicable) and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section on this page. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
